name: Analysis & Reporting Pipeline
description: Multi-stage pipeline for comprehensive data analysis, metric extraction, quality assessment, and report generation.

steps.name: Collect Data
steps.description: Gather source materials and supporting datasets.

steps.name: Analyze Metrics
steps.description: Extract and compute quantitative metrics (counts, ratios, distributions).

steps.name: Analyze Coverage
steps.description: Assess completeness and scope of content coverage.

steps.name: Analyze Consistency
steps.description: Identify inconsistencies in terminology, format, and structure.

steps.name: Validate Against Thresholds
steps.description: Apply quality thresholds and gate criteria; flag violations.

steps.name: Generate Report
steps.description: Compile analysis results, metrics, and recommendations into final report.
